leads.notes: Pakistani/North Indian restaurant franchise that just opened its Halifax location in January 2026. 17th location nationally, first in Atlantic Canada. New franchise location = immediate need for local bookkeeping, HST filing, payroll setup. Franchise model means they follow corporate playbook but need a local accountant who understands Nova Scotia tax obligations. High urgency — first fiscal quarter just starting.
leads.suggestedApproach: Email or Instagram DM referencing the Halifax grand opening. Position Nmbr as the go-to for new franchise locations in Atlantic Canada — modern, remote-friendly, understands restaurant accounting (tips, HST, food cost tracking).

leads.source: Ottawa Business Journal — 2026 Fastest Growing Companies (#3, 495% revenue growth)
leads.notes: Mobile app for construction job-site compliance. 495% revenue growth over 3 years. Started with pure outbound cold calling (hundreds per week), now expanding into partnerships and marketing channels. This screams AI automation opportunity — lead qualification, outbound sequencing, CRM automation, customer onboarding workflows. They explicitly mentioned expanding sales channels, which is exactly where AI agents shine. Ottawa-based, scaling fast.
leads.suggestedApproach: LinkedIn outreach to founders referencing the OBJ Fastest Growing award. Lead with: 'You scaled from cold calls to multi-channel — what if AI agents handled your lead qualification and follow-up sequences automatically?' Position SystemsbyAI as the next growth lever after they've proven product-market fit.

leads.source: Ottawa Business Journal — 2026 Fastest Growing Companies (#2, 668% revenue growth)
leads.notes: Boutique B2B/B2C marketing agency in Ottawa. 668% revenue growth over 3 years — that kind of growth creates bookkeeping chaos fast. Boutique agencies often outgrow their original accountant or DIY QuickBooks setup around this inflection point. They're focused on 'long-term relationships' and 'measurable results' — they'd value an accountant who speaks the same language. Potential dual lead: Nmbr for accounting + SystemsbyAI for automating client reporting workflows.
leads.suggestedApproach: LinkedIn message referencing the OBJ award. Lead with: 'Congrats on 668% growth — at that pace, is your bookkeeping keeping up? We help fast-growing agencies stay on top of finances so they can focus on clients.' Keep it casual, peer-to-peer.

leads.source: Ottawa Business Journal — 2026 Fastest Growing Companies (#1, 979% revenue growth)
leads.notes: HVAC company doing heat pump installations across Canada. 979% revenue growth — fastest growing in the Ottawa region. Already built proprietary technology to 'streamline operations, increase conversions and enhance customer experience.' They navigate government rebate programs (complex paperwork). Multi-province operations. They're already tech-forward — perfect SystemsbyAI prospect for: AI-powered rebate eligibility screening, automated customer follow-up, cross-province compliance automation, lead routing. They WANT automation and have proven they'll invest in it.
leads.suggestedApproach: Direct outreach to CEO referencing their proprietary tech stack and OBJ #1 ranking. Lead with: 'You've already built tech to streamline operations — what if AI agents could handle rebate eligibility screening and multi-province customer routing automatically?' Position as the next layer on their existing tech investment.

leads.company: Rosie's Burgers Halifax (Happy Belly Food Group franchise)
leads.source: Globe and Mail + Newsfile Corp press release — Nov 2025 opening
leads.notes: First Atlantic Canada location for Rosie's Burgers (smash burger QSR chain), opened late 2025 on Blowers Street, Halifax. Parent company Happy Belly Food Group (CSE: HBFG) is publicly traded and aggressively expanding — 115 locations secured nationally. A second Halifax franchise agreement was also signed. New franchisees in Atlantic Canada need local accounting support for: HST compliance, payroll, food cost management, franchise fee reporting. The franchisee is likely independent from corporate accounting and needs their own bookkeeper.
leads.suggestedApproach: Visit the location or reach out via Instagram/local channels. Position Nmbr as specializing in restaurant/franchise accounting for Atlantic Canada. Mention understanding of franchise financial reporting requirements. Could also connect with the second incoming Halifax franchisee before they even open.
